name: SetMapObjectText
title: SetMapObjectText
syntax: long SetMapObjectText( long handle, char text[] ); // form 1
long SetMapObjectText( long handle, char formattedText[], float value ); // form 2
description: Sets text (form 1) or formatted text (form 2) for a map object of the type text.

parameters.name: formattedText
parameters.description: Text with a placeholder for a variable which should be displayed.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Variable which should be displayed in the text.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
